tasks.title: Create css/tokens/vng.css with VNG palette and semantic tokens
tasks.description: Convert VNG design tokens from tilburg-woo-ui SCSS format to nldesign CSS format. Map --tilburg-* palette tokens to --vng-* organization tokens and --nldesign-* semantic tokens. Include colors, typography (Avenir), spacing, borders, header/background tokens. Exclude --utrecht-* component tokens.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the tilburg-woo-ui VNG token source file exists WHEN vng.css is created THEN it contains :root declarations with --vng-color-* palette tokens using resolved hex values
AND it contains --nldesign-* semantic tokens mapped to VNG colors (primary=#003865, error=#bf1a12, success=#01745a, warning=#d45f01)
AND it contains typography tokens with Avenir font family
AND it contains spacing and border radius tokens
AND it contains header and background tokens
AND no --utrecht-* component tokens are present

tasks.title: Add VNG entry to token-sets.json
tasks.description: Register VNG in the token-sets.json manifest so TokenSetService discovers it and it appears in the admin dropdown.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN token-sets.json exists with current entries WHEN the VNG entry is added THEN an entry with id 'vng', name 'VNG Vereniging Nederlandse Gemeenten', and a description exists
AND the file remains valid JSON

tasks.title: Verify VNG token set loads and applies correctly
tasks.description: End-to-end verification that VNG appears in the admin dropdown, can be selected, and applies the theme correctly.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN vng.css exists and token-sets.json includes VNG WHEN the admin selects VNG in nldesign settings THEN the theme applies without errors
AND the VNG color palette is visible in the UI
AND the admin dropdown lists VNG as a selectable option
